positive: A vibrant, stylized celestial raccoon wearing a mischievous expression, surrounded by geometric constellation patterns and flowing nebula dust. The raccoon should be centered, in a dramatic, clean silhouette style, contrasting sharply against a deep indigo cosmic background. Incorporate elements of cosmic humor, such as tiny planets orbiting its tail and stylized stars forming elegant arcs. High contrast, pop-art influence, vector graphic quality, suitable for screen printing on dark apparel, with clean edges and bold lines. Central composition, full body shot, detailed yet minimalist.
